name: 云梦之音 The Melody of Yunmeng
short_description: This is an auto battler game that requires backpack management and equipment management! Buy rare equipment to create a powerful combination and then compete with other players!
detailed_description: This is a game with abundant items. Through the combination of various items, each item refresh can bring different attributes to the characters. There are a great many combinations and randomness. The advantage is asynchronous combat. You don't need to wait for other players to operate. You can spend a lot of time configuring the combinations you want until you are satisfied and start the battle.
about_the_game: This is a game with abundant items. Through the combination of various items, each item refresh can bring different attributes to the characters. supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
